name: public-dataset-sources
description: Local subprocess retrieval plugin for public biomedical dataset sources.

sources.label: NCBI BioSample
sources.description: Sample metadata via NCBI E-utilities and Datasets BioSample report APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum BioSample records to request from ESearch.

sources.label: ArrayExpress
sources.description: Functional genomics studies via EMBL-EBI BioStudies ArrayExpress collection.

interface.shortDescription: BioSample and ArrayExpress as local retrieval plugins
interface.longDescription: Moves public dataset data-source execution for BioSample and ArrayExpress behind Omiga's local search/query/fetch subprocess route protocol.
defaultPrompt: Search BioSample for liver single-cell RNA-seq samples.
Fetch BioSample SAMN04271175 through the dataset plugin.
Search ArrayExpress for E-MTAB single-cell studies.
